title: Task: Inspect the x-auto repo conventions conceptually from available cues and recommend the minimal safe path to make 10 draft posts more ready for approval. Focus on blockers such as image requirements, scheduling, source citation, category/pattern balance. Return a concise checklist of what can b...
summary_text: **10-draft “ready-for-approval” path (minimal-safe, low-risk)** ### What is already healthy - Source citations: all 10 drafts appear to have `Source URLs` populated and source assertions are present. - Content shape: bodies are in expected range (`~800–1000` chars) and quote-post rule appears respected (`x.com/twitter.com` not in body where required). - Category/pattern balance: 10 unique categories and 10 unique patterns (no concentration risk on this batch). ### Can be automated now 1. **Batch validation against x-auto contract** - Run contract/norm checks on all 10 rows: - status workflow state expected (`draft`) before approval. - body/source/Source URLs alignment by post type. - length target (for scheduler candidates) and markdown/body formatting sanity. - hard-block quote/source-URL constraints. 2. **Gap detection script** - Flag rows missing: `scheduled_for`, `notion_page_id`, `image_path`, `tweet_id`, required source linkage. 3. **Category/pattern balance check** - Keep a simple distribution check before each batch approval to prevent skew (currently balanced, so no action needed yet). 4. **Canonical source audit (note-link rows)** - Verify source article links are in `Body` / `Body JA` (not only in `Source URLs`), and `Source URLs` contains canonical source. 5. **Health-style dry-run** - Re-run a dry-run equivalent of `x-auto-health` logic on staging data to ensure no hidden hard blockers before any manual approval/scheduling. ### Must remain manual (or human-in-the-loop) 1. **Image readiness** - Thumbnails are still absent for all 10 (`image_path` null). - Safe flow: create/assign visuals manually, then run the approved-thumbnail sync step (required `approved` file + Notion page linkage + SHA parity). 2. **Scheduling** - `scheduled_for` is empty for all rows. - Need explicit slot assignment (timezone-correct datetime) and post window policy checks by human reviewer. 3. **Approval handoff** - Approve/publish action remains manual or controlled workflow step via x-auto guard with explicit preflight. 4. **Final human review** - Readability, tone, trademark/risk review, and “is this actually publish-worthy?” judgment cannot be fully automated safely. 5. **Notion linkage completion** - Any rows missing Notion page IDs or publish metadata still need human/connector-driven completion before posting. ### Minimal safe sequence (recommended) 1. Run automated contract + gap + balance checks on all 10. 2. Fix only machine-detectable issues first (source/format/length/safety flags). 3. Manually assign/approve images and schedule times. 4. Re-run validation. 5. Move rows to approval path in small batches (under guard). 6. Final manual publish preflight (source citation + image + schedule + slot policy).
